g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the preprocessed data format before augmentation')
sendPrompt('How does the augmentation copy originals first?')

g.text: Loop: for each original sample (1 to N)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the original signal extracted for augmentation?')
sendPrompt('How does random amplitude scaling work?')
sendPrompt('How does Gaussian noise injection work?')

sendPrompt('How is the augmented sample appended to the dataset?')
sendPrompt('What does the augmented dataset look like?')

svg.text: Class balance preserved: if 8 Normal before, now 16 Normal after.
Each augmented sample is unique (different random seed per iteration).
